mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_interest (user_id, tag_id, weight, source, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{tagId}, #{weight}, #{source}, #{updateTime})

INSERT INTO user_interest (user_id, tag_id, weight, source, update_time) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.tagId}, #{item.weight}, #{item.source}, #{item.updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, tag_id, weight, source, update_time FROM user_interest WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT id, user_id, tag_id, weight, source, update_time FROM user_interest WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND tag_id = #{tagId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_interest WHERE user_id = #{userId}
